notes.text: Welcome everyone. Today we're going to demystify AI agents. By the end of this talk, you'll see that the core loop is surprisingly simple.

cues.text: Let the title slide breathe for 3 seconds before speaking

notes.text: Here's the thing that surprised me most when I started building agents. The loop is just: get input, call tools, return results. That's it.

cues.text: Stress 'That's it' — this is the key insight
